creator: cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com
text: I personally do not use any of the ports that depend on py-dns-lexicon (which appears to be mostly certbot-related ports), so I do not know what I would need to do in order to update them as well or what sort of backlash such a thing would cause. I also don't maintain any python ports myself so I do not know what needs to be done to make a port python 3.x only. I mostly just intended to provide an update to the latest version based on what I could see from its GitHub repository.
